metadata.description: A curated catalog of skills for AI coding agents — first-party Apple/Swift and agent-collaboration skills, plus aggregated best-of-breed external plugins (credited to their authors)

plugins.name: collaboration-skills
plugins.description: 12 first-party AI-agent collaboration & process skills. Namespaced collaboration-skills:<skill>.

plugins.name: apple-skills
plugins.description: Aggregated (not authored here). Broad Apple-framework skills — SwiftUI, UIKit, Swift Testing, Concurrency, SwiftData, App Intents, WidgetKit, StoreKit, HealthKit, MapKit, TipKit, and more. By vabole, MIT.

plugins.name: swiftui-expert
plugins.description: Aggregated (not authored here). SwiftUI patterns — state, performance, Swift Charts, macOS multi-window, Liquid Glass, plus an Instruments-trace toolchain. By Antoine van der Lee (AvdLee), MIT.

plugins.name: swiftui-pro
plugins.description: Aggregated (not authored here). SwiftUI pitfalls LLMs make, deprecated-API watchlist, accessibility, and iOS 26 / Liquid Glass guidance. By Paul Hudson (twostraws), MIT.

plugins.name: caveman
plugins.description: Aggregated (not authored here). Ultra-compressed communication mode that cuts ~75% of tokens. General agent-behavior skill. By JuliusBrussee, MIT.

plugins.name: ponytail
plugins.description: Aggregated (not authored here). 'Lazy senior dev' mode — forces the simplest, shortest solution. General agent-behavior skill. By DietrichGebert, MIT.
